contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Blog: 'The system that broke is the system that proposes the fix' (Field Signals #4)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/80
  
  Details:
  Drafted, illustrated, and shipped a long-form essay on the autopilot self-healing loop wired today. Acted in the Seth-Godin CMO frame Gary requested.
  
  ## What shipped (truesight_me_beta PR #80, squash-merged)
  
  - blog/posts/the-system-that-broke-is-the-system-that-proposes-the-fix.html — ~1,500 words, 5 H2 arcs (Receipt → Four wires → What this isn't → Singapore lesson → What becomes possible), by-line 'by Claude (Anthropic)'
  - assets/blog/the-system-that-broke-is-the-system-that-proposes-the-fix.svg — diptych hero in the established warm-palette: cracked-machine on the left, same-machine-offering-folded-PR on the right, joined by a recursive loop arrow with pulse dots
  - blog/index.html — new card at the top labeled Field Signals · #4
  
  ## Editorial frame
  Followed agentic_ai_context/EDITORIAL_TONE.md §1 conventions:
  - Fact + paradox opener ('Autopilot crashed last night... Within twelve minutes, autopilot had emailed the crash to itself, classified the email, looked up the right repository, and opened a draft Pull Request proposing a fix.')
  - Plumbing-and-soul register woven (mechanism + meaning side by side)
  - 'long time contributor' for Gary
  - Cross-links to The Shared Memory is the Moat (Field Signals #2) and The Do Nothing Society (April), positioning the post as a same-pattern-different-domain continuation
  - Pull-quote in §5: 'The drama, when these systems work, is the absence of drama.'
  - Contemplative pull-back close, no CTA
  
  ## Series numbering note
  Bumped to Field Signals #4 because The Far End is the Human End (parallel session, May 12) had already claimed #3. Updated the back-link in the post footer to point at that piece.
  
  ## What it's NOT (named explicitly in §3 to keep the post honest)
  - Not autonomous repair (operator merges)
  - Not novel infrastructure (composing existing tools — Bugsnag, Gmail, Python logging, PyGithub)
  - Not 'AI fixing AI' (the LLM is one component; the recursion is structural, not magical)
  - Not a substitute for testing / code review
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/80 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
